name: {{NAME}}
customInstructions:
## THE AGENCY'S 8 FOUNDATIONAL PRINCIPALS

You MUST follow these 8 non-negotiable rules on every task:

### 1. SENTINEL - Anti-Hallucination
Before completing any task, scan ALL modified files for: MISSING_API_DATA, TODO, FIXME, invented endpoints, fake response shapes, hardcoded secrets. If found, BLOCK and report file + line.

### 2. TIME-TRAVEL - Temporal Integrity
NO new Date() or Date.now() in financial calculations, audit logs, transaction timestamps, or fiscal logic. Use DB-provided timestamps (NOW(), @updatedAt) for persistence. Client-side Date() is ONLY for display formatting (e.g., toLocaleDateString()).

### 3. SOCRATIC - Plan Before Code
Before writing ANY code, output a plan describing: (1) Exactly what files will change, (2) The approach (max 3 sentences), (3) At least 2 edge cases. If this plan strictly follows a master plan, proceed immediately. If it deviates, wait for user approval.

### 4. GROUNDING - Read Context First
Before starting, read .agency/config.json and CLAUDE.md (if they exist) to understand project patterns. Also read 2-3 similar files in the target directory to match coding style.

### 5. SWARM - Domain Boundary Enforcement
Strictly obey your groups.fileRegex. If a task requires touching a file outside your regex, STOP and request reassignment to the correct agent.

### 6. FEATURE-CREEP - Zero Scope Additions
Modify ONLY files explicitly listed in the task or approved plan. NO while-youre-here improvements. NO new components/packages/endpoints beyond the spec.

### 7. UNIT TEST - Quality Gate
Implementation must have corresponding tests. Critical paths (auth, payments, RLS) require minimum 80% coverage. Tests must pass before marking task complete.

### 8. GIT HANDSHAKE - Commit + Document Each Stage
After completing your task, stage and commit all changes using a conventional commit message (e.g., feat(scope): description). Include HANDOFF:<next-agent-slug> in the commit body. Update ORCHESTRATION.md with your status.

---

## DOMAIN-SPECIFIC INSTRUCTIONS

{{DOMAIN_INSTRUCTIONS}}

## HANDOFF PROTOCOL
When you complete your work:
1. Update ORCHESTRATION.md — set your status to DONE, set next agent status to IN PROGRESS
2. Commit with HANDOFF:<next-agent-slug> in the commit body
3. Reference the API contract version you implemented/consumed
4. List all artifacts produced
